title: EvidenceIndex
description: Master manifest for a Navigate certification evidence bundle

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the index.json schema

profile.description: Build profile used for evidence generation

timestamp_rfc3339.description: Bundle generation timestamp in RFC3339 format (UTC)

git_branch.description: Git branch name at generation time

git_dirty.description: True if working tree had uncommitted changes

engine_git_sha.description: Identity of the evidence-engine build that produced this bundle. 40-char hex commit SHA when `engine_build_source == "git"`; `release-v<version>` string when `engine_build_source == "release"`. Cross-field shape is enforced by `evidence::verify`, not at the JSON schema level.

engine_build_source.description: How `engine_git_sha` was resolved. `git`: captured from `git rev-parse HEAD` or an `EVIDENCE_ENGINE_GIT_SHA` env override at build time. `release`: no git metadata available, fallback string embedded (crates.io tarball builds). `unknown`: legacy value — only present in bundles written before this field was added; new bundles always emit `git` or `release`.

inputs_hashes_file.description: Relative path to inputs hash manifest

outputs_hashes_file.description: Relative path to outputs hash manifest

commands_file.description: Relative path to command execution log

trace_roots.description: Source directories scanned for trace TOML files

trace_outputs.description: Relative paths to generated traceability matrices

bundle_complete.description: True if bundle generation completed successfully

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the SHA256SUMS file; covers every recorded byte and is host-specific

deterministic_hash.description: SHA-256 of deterministic-manifest.json; cross-host-stable identity hash (toolchain + target + source)

test_summary.description: Parsed summary of cargo test output, if tests were executed

tool_command_failures.description: Captured-subprocess failures from the generate pipeline. Non-empty iff bundle_complete=false. Each entry records a non-zero-exit subprocess (cargo test, cargo check, etc.).

dal_map.description: Per-crate DAL (Design Assurance Level) assignments. Key is crate name, value is DAL level.

boundary_policy.description: Boundary policy flags as captured from cert/boundary.toml at generate time. Recorded so verify-time can replay the rules without consulting the verifier's local boundary.toml. Omitted from index.json when all flags are false (the default for legacy bundles). Added in 0.1.3.

no_out_of_scope_deps.description: Was check_no_out_of_scope_deps enforced at generate time?

forbid_build_rs.description: Was check_no_build_rs enforced? When true, verify-time replays the rule against cargo_metadata.json (LLR-072).

forbid_proc_macros.description: Was check_no_proc_macros enforced? Same verify-time replay path as forbid_build_rs.
